agent_spec.task: Search the knowledge base for 'latency incident 0' and retrieve the full content of the top result so I can understand the root cause and mitigation steps.

tools.description: Searches the knowledge base for documents matching the query string. Takes a query string and an integer top_k, and returns a list of documents with titles and snippets.
Retrieves the full text of a document given its doc_id. Returns the document title and full content.
